---
title: "01_binning"
author: "Kaushik Surej"
date: "2026-07-15"
output: html_document
---

## Step 2: Binning of the programme with metabat
```bash
metabat2 -i assembly_bbd_ordered.fasta -a depths_bbd.txt --cvExt -o bins_bbd/metabat --seed 5
```
### Binning with metabat is considered as an important step because it helps in grouping contigs that are likely to originate withtin the bacterial genome
### The results that have been produced is a collection of metagenome assembled genomes called (MAGs) which might or might not represent a particular species or population present

## Step 3: Bin quality with checkm
```bash
samtools faidx ../flye/bbd/assembly.fasta contig_116 > bins_bbd/contig_116.fa
```
